title: Knowledge Book
description: A book thats give all recipes!
body:
# Knowledge Book

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1327308441324097681?label=discord&color=blue&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/5UdcDa5xNC) 
[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/ly-knowledge-book?label=modrinth&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ly-knowledge-book)
[![License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/lullaby6/data-packs)](https://github.com/lullaby6/data-packs/blob/main/LICENSE)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Ve8YWdkYVsI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 📖 Description

A book that when you right click on it gives you all recipes!

## 🛠️ Recipe

![Recipe](https://i.imgur.com/7JCpVnd.png)

## ⌨️ Commands

Give:

```mcfunction
/loot give @s loot knowledge_book:knowledge_book
```
